title: nervilia flabelliformis
intro: Nervilia flabelliformis, also known as the fan-leaved nervilia, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties that can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Nervilia flabelliformis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing due to its antiseptic properties. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, and it is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of Asia.
